windows.video_title: How to Add Scent to a Candle : Basic Candle Making
windows.description: Intro flashes (white/green) to a finished Pure Integrity candle as a teaser.
windows.description_detailed: Intro flashes (white/green) to a finished Pure Integrity candle as a teaser. intro phase, ~0% in, 0:00–0:07.

windows.video_title: How to Add Scent to a Candle : Basic Candle Making
windows.description: Bald host in a candle store talks to camera; a finished candle on the counter.
windows.description_detailed: Bald host in a candle store talks to camera; a finished candle on the counter. aux phase, ~7% in, 0:07–0:15.

windows.video_title: How to Add Scent to a Candle : Basic Candle Making
windows.description: Host talks; a large metal melting pot sits on a scale beside him.
windows.description_detailed: Host talks; a large metal melting pot sits on a scale beside him. Host talking to camera with no hands-on action visible (explaining, tips). aux phase, ~14% in, 0:15–0:23. Terminology: mushrooming.

windows.video_title: How to Add Scent to a Candle : Basic Candle Making
windows.description: Hands hold a wooden stir stick over the large metal melting pot of wax.
windows.description_detailed: Hands hold a wooden stir stick over the large metal melting pot of wax. process phase, ~21% in, 0:23–0:31.

windows.video_title: How to Add Scent to a Candle : Basic Candle Making
windows.description: The big metal pot with a wick clip on the rim and a wooden stir stick; wax inside.
windows.description_detailed: The big metal pot with a wick clip on the rim and a wooden stir stick; wax inside. process phase, ~29% in, 0:31–0:39. Terminology: wick bar.

windows.video_title: How to Add Scent to a Candle : Basic Candle Making
windows.description: Hands measure depth/level in the pot with a stick and point things out.
windows.description_detailed: Hands measure depth/level in the pot with a stick and point things out. process phase, ~36% in, 0:39–0:47.

windows.video_title: How to Add Scent to a Candle : Basic Candle Making
windows.description: Host points at the pot rim and wick as the wax stands ready.
windows.description_detailed: Host points at the pot rim and wick as the wax stands ready. process phase, ~43% in, 0:47–0:55.

windows.video_title: How to Add Scent to a Candle : Basic Candle Making
windows.description: A stick/probe is inserted into the pot to stir in scent (the video's topic is adding fragrance).
windows.description_detailed: A stick/probe is inserted into the pot to stir in scent (the video's topic is adding fragrance). process phase, ~50% in, 0:55–1:03.

windows.video_title: How to Add Scent to a Candle : Basic Candle Making
windows.description: Hands stir the pot to blend fragrance into the wax.
windows.description_detailed: Hands stir the pot to blend fragrance into the wax. process phase, ~57% in, 1:03–1:11.

windows.video_title: How to Add Scent to a Candle : Basic Candle Making
windows.description: Work at a glass jar with a wick — wax being poured/handled.
windows.description_detailed: Work at a glass jar with a wick — wax being poured/handled. assemble phase, ~64% in, 1:11–1:19.

windows.video_title: How to Add Scent to a Candle : Basic Candle Making
windows.description: The glass jar holds wax with a centred wick; hands adjust it.
windows.description_detailed: The glass jar holds wax with a centred wick; hands adjust it. assemble phase, ~71% in, 1:19–1:27.

windows.video_title: How to Add Scent to a Candle : Basic Candle Making
windows.description: Finished Pure Integrity candle in the glass with its wick shown.
windows.description_detailed: Finished Pure Integrity candle in the glass with its wick shown. finish phase, ~79% in, 1:27–1:35.

windows.video_title: How to Add Scent to a Candle : Basic Candle Making
windows.description: End card over the finished candle; 'filmed by Bad Ferret Films'.
windows.description_detailed: End card over the finished candle; 'filmed by Bad Ferret Films'. aux phase, ~86% in, 1:35–1:43.

windows.video_title: How to Add Scent to a Candle : Basic Candle Making
